nodes.label: Martingale Gale Cascade ($2 â†’ $4 â†’ $8, stop on first win or after 2nd gale)
Per-Signal State Machine (pending â†’ placed_initial â†’ placed_gale1 â†’ placed_gale2 â†’ done_win/done_loss/error)
Railway.app persistent Docker container + Postgres add-on
PostgreSQL via asyncpg (signals / stages / daily_summary schema)
Demo-only Hard Guardrail (OLYMP_ACCOUNT_GROUP=real refused when DRY_RUN=false)
OlympTrade WebSocket Protocol Events (e:26 TRADE_CLOSED, e:55 balances, e:75 limits, e:90 ping, e:1068 instrument listing, e:1097 sentiment, e:110 user, e:111 count)
Pair Mapping (EUR/JPY slash â†’ broker-internal pair via auto-discover on e:1068)
Strict Time-Window Enforcement (FR-3.3 / 3.6 / 5.9 â€” missed trigger ends cascade with signal_expired)
Optional Daily Limits (DAILY_LOSS_LIMIT, DAILY_TRADE_LIMIT, DAILY_DRAWDOWN_PCT â€” 0 = disabled)
DryRunBroker (default for v1; logs intended trades, never connects)
Signal dataclass (signal_id=sha1[:12], pair, direction, trigger_hhmm, expiration_seconds, received_at_unix, source_message_id, source_chat_id, raw_text)
Why Vercel Does Not Work (serverless incompatible with persistent WS)
